An open notebook with a spiral binding is on the desk.

atomic_facts.fact: The flag features a dark blue field with the Great Seal of the State of Montana in the center.
The seal's outer ring contains the text 'THE GREAT SEAL OF THE STATE OF MONTANA'.
The inner scene depicts mountains, a river or waterfall, and a foreground with a plow, pick, and shovel.
A white ribbon at the bottom of the seal reads 'ORO Y PLATA'.
The sky in the seal illustration shows sun rays emanating from behind the mountains.
